common.activate_in: Your baggage must be activated before use.

errors.qr_not_valid_desc: This QR code does not exist in our system.

errors.protection_expired_desc: The protection for this baggage has expired.

errors.location_unavailable: Location unavailable. Please enter the location manually.
errors.location_timeout: Location timeout. Please enter the location manually or try again.
errors.error_occurred: An error occurred. Please try again.

finder.found_description: Thank you for helping locate this baggage.

finder.context_label: Where did you find this baggage?

whatsapp.signature: *QRBag – Protect your luggage with peace of mind.*

chatbot.title: QRBag Assistant
chatbot.error_fallback: Sorry, I can't answer right now. Please contact the owner directly via WhatsApp.
chatbot.suggestion_1: What should I do with this baggage?
chatbot.welcome: Hello! 👋 I'm the QRBag assistant. How can I help you with this baggage?
